S

saveToJson(TransportData, String) - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Saves the entire transport data (map, stations, departures) to a JSON file.
setBusStation(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Sets the bus station name.
setCity(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Sets the city name.
setCountryMap(String[][]) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Sets the country map.
setDepartures(List<Departure>) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Sets the list of departures for this station.
setDepartures(List<Departure>) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Sets the list of departures.
setDepartureTime(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the departure time.
setDuration(int) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the duration of the trip.
setFrom(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the departure station.
setMinTransferTime(int) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the minimum transfer time after arrival.
setName(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Sets the name of the city.
setPrice(int) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the price of the trip.
setStation(Station) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Sets the station located in the city.
setStations(List<Station>) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Sets the list of stations.
setTo(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the destination city.
setTrainStation(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Sets the train station name.
setType(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Sets the type of transport.
setX(int) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Sets the x-coordinate of the city.
setY(int) - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Sets the y-coordinate of the city.
shortest_travel_time - Enum constant in enum class com.transportapp.graph.Criteria
 
show(Stage) - Method in class com.transportapp.gui.RouteSelectionScreen
Shows the route selection screen on the given stage.
showDimensionInputDialog(Stage) - Method in class com.transportapp.gui.DimensionInputDialog
Displays a dialog window to the user, allowing them to input the dimensions of the map.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.transportapp.Main
 
Station - Class in com.transportapp.model
Represents a station in a city, which includes both a bus and a train station.
Station() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.Station
Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.
Station(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.Station
Constructs a new Station with the specified city, bus station, and train station names.
stations - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
A list of station objects corresponding to cities.
